channel.title: Fitness on DotKsp Writings
channel.description: Recent content in Fitness on DotKsp Writings

item.title: I Did 100 Push-Ups Every Day for 60 Days ; My Body Before and After
item.description: Sixty days. 6,000 push-ups. Here is what happened to my body : and my mind.

item.title: The No-Excuse Home Workout: Zero Equipment, Maximum Results
item.description: No gym membership. No equipment. No excuses. A complete bodyweight routine you can do in your living room.
